title: Anchorage Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Anchorage with a Z-Score of -3.40. This event is rated as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Anchorage are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 12.9 GG, indicating a substantial need for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 76%, with a gentle breeze of 2.5 km/h, and no Cooling Degree Days (CDD) are recorded.
conclusion: Monitoring and preparedness are essential to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to frost
